# services.nncp

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.nncp`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.nncp.caller.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable cron'ed NNCP TCP daemon caller. The daemon will take configuration from [](#opt-programs.nncp.settings) . |
| `services.nncp.caller.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra command-line arguments to pass to caller. |
| `services.nncp.daemon.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable NNCP TCP synronization daemon. The daemon will take configuration from [](#opt-programs.nncp.settings) . |
| `services.nncp.daemon.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra command-line arguments to pass to daemon. |
| `services.nncp.daemon.socketActivation.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable socket activation for nncp-daemon. |
| `services.nncp.daemon.socketActivation.listenStreams` | `list of string` | TCP sockets to bind to. See [](#opt-systemd.sockets._name_.listenStreams). |
